headline: Super vs ChatGPT: personal AI agents for real computer work

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs ChatGPT. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost. Include a long-form buyer guide with a decision matrix, migration checklist, how-to evaluation plan, and source-backed caveats.
site_brief.title: Super vs ChatGPT

summary: A fair, practical comparison for people choosing between ChatGPT and Super. ChatGPT is excellent for conversation and one‑off automation. Super is built for durable computer‑use workflows, with a reusable computer-use cache that improves reliability and lowers cost over repeated runs. This guide explains when each tool fits, how to evaluate them side‑by‑side, and how to decide based on your actual work.
